commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a persistence-success guard before clearing legacy credential/account stores and adds a save-failure/retry regression test for the config migrator.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: point CodexBarConfigStore at a config path whose parent is a regular file, seed a legacy token, and call loadOrMigrate; current main logs the save failure but still reaches legacy cleanup.
commands.review_followup: Human handling remains because there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to make, but the PR still needs real behavior proof or explicit maintainer acceptance for credential migration behavior.

target.title: Keep legacy credentials when config save fails
target.body:
Fixes #1140.

## Summary
- Stop legacy credential cleanup when migrated settings cannot be persisted.
- Keep the migration completion flag unset after a failed save so a later launch can retry.
- Add regression coverage for a blocked settings path and the retry path after persistence works again.

## Validation
- Parser hash check passed.
- SwiftFormat lint passed.
- SwiftLint strict passed with the local SourceKit framework path.
- Core target build passed.

## Maintainer validation
- `make check`
- `swift test --filter CodexBarConfigMigratorTests`

Focused test output covered the failed-save path preserving the legacy token and leaving the migration completion flag unset, then the retry path clearing the legacy token after persistence recovered.
target.author: rajvardhanpatil07
